'''Iseeya Yado''' was a younger brother to the Yad sisters. He was a pilot and a musician in their smuggling operations. He was wanted by Coruscant Police for these smuggling operations and his bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
